home.headline: What's on your plate
home.subtitle: Brain-dump everything. dailyplan turns it into a realistic time-blocked day.

braindump.label: Brain dump — everything on your plate today
braindump.placeholder:
Write meeting with Jake at 2pm
Finish the quarterly report
Reply to pending emails
Gym session
Pick up groceries
Review pull requests...
braindump.upsell: You've made {count} plans! Sign up to save your history, track streaks, and join the leaderboard.
braindump.errorNoKey: No Mistral API key found. Go to Settings to add one.
braindump.errorInvalidKey: Invalid API key. Please check your key in Settings.
braindump.errorRateLimit: Too many requests. Please try again in a moment.

history.title: History
history.guestNotice: Showing last 7 plans from this device.

leaderboard.title: Leaderboard
leaderboard.subtitle: Earn points by creating plans, maintaining streaks, and hitting perfect days.
leaderboard.empty: No rankings yet. Create a plan to get on the board!

profile.cta: Create more plans to unlock badges and climb the leaderboard!

badges.title: Badges
badges.subtitle: Earn badges by creating plans, building streaks, and mastering your schedule.
badges.cta: Keep creating plans to unlock all badges and become the ultimate planner!

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Customize your DailyPlan experience.
settings.deleteConfirmation: Type DELETE to confirm your account deletion. This action is permanent and cannot be undone.
settings.keyNote: It's free, takes 2 minutes, and requires no credit card.

keygate.title: Mistral API Key Required
keygate.description: DailyPlan uses your own free Mistral key — it never touches our servers and stays only in your browser.
keygate.goSettings: I have a key — go to Settings
keygate.privacy: Your key never leaves your browser — stored only in localStorage.
